sentences.target: On habite au nord de la ville.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ abit o nɔʁ də la vil/

translations.fr: On habite au nord de la ville.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ abit o nɔʁ də la vil/
translations.en: We live in the north of the city.
translations.es: Vivimos en el norte de la ciudad.
translations.de: Wir wohnen im Norden der Stadt.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sống ở phía bắc thành phố.
translations.nl: We wonen in het noorden van de stad.
translations.hi: हम शहर के उत्तरी हिस्से में रहते हैं.
translations.el: Ζούμε στο βόρειο τμήμα της πόλης.
translations.id: Kami tinggal di bagian utara kota.
translations.sv: Vi bor i norra delen av staden.
translations.ro: Locuim în partea de nord a orașului.
translations.da: Vi bor i den nordlige del af byen.
translations.ja: 私たちは市の北部に住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (3rd person singular), acts as the subject of the verb.
Main finite verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with 'On'.
Preposition contracted with the definite article ('à' + 'le'); introduces the location/direction.
Common noun denoting a cardinal direction; object of the preposition 'au'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'de la ville' that specifies reference.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'ville'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Tu prends la sortie vers le nord.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ la sɔʁti vɛʁ lə nɔʁ/

translations.fr: Tu prends la sortie vers le nord.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ la sɔʁti vɛʁ lə nɔʁ/
translations.en: You take the exit toward the north.
translations.es: Toma la salida hacia el norte.
translations.ru: Сверни на съезд в сторону севера.
translations.pt: Pegue a saída em direção ao norte.
translations.vi: Đi theo lối ra về hướng bắc.
translations.nl: Neem de afrit richting het noorden.
translations.uk: Зверни на з’їзд у напрямку півночі.
translations.hu: Hajts le az észak felé vezető kijáraton.
translations.hi: उत्तर की ओर वाले निकास से निकलो.
translations.id: Ambil pintu keluar ke arah utara.
translations.ja: 北方面の出口で降りてください。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun; subject of the verb.
Main finite verb, present indicative (2nd person singular), taking a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'sortie'.
Common noun; direct object of 'prends'.
Preposition introducing a directional complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'nord'.
Common noun denoting a direction; object of the preposition 'vers'.

sentences.target: Je veux aller au nord cet été.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø zale o nɔʁ sɛt ete/

translations.fr: Je veux aller au nord cet été.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø zale o nɔʁ sɛt ete/
translations.en: I want to go north this summer.
translations.es: Quiero ir al norte este verano.
translations.de: Ich will diesen Sommer nach Norden fahren.
translations.ru: Этим летом я хочу поехать на север.
translations.pt: Neste verão quero ir para o norte.
translations.vi: Mùa hè này tôi muốn đi về phía bắc.
translations.ar: هذا الصيف أريد أن أذهب شمالًا.
translations.nl: Deze zomer wil ik naar het noorden gaan.
translations.uk: Цього літа я хочу поїхати на північ.
translations.hi: इस गर्मी मैं उत्तर की ओर जाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Tego lata chcę pojechać na północ.
translations.el: Αυτό το καλοκαίρι θέλω να πάω προς βορρά.
translations.nb: I sommer vil jeg dra nordover.
translations.id: Musim panas ini saya ingin pergi ke utara.
translations.sv: I sommar vill jag åka norrut.
translations.ro: Vara asta vreau să merg spre nord.
translations.cs: Toto léto chci jet na sever.
translations.ja: 今年の夏は北へ行きたいです。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'veux'.
Main finite verb, present indicative (1st person singular) expressing desire; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement (xcomp) of 'veux' indicating the intended action.
Preposition contracted with the definite article ('à' + 'le'); introduces the goal/direction.
Common noun denoting a direction; object of the preposition 'au'.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine before vowel); modifies 'été' to form a time expression.
Common noun; used as a temporal nominal, functioning adverbially in 'cet été'.

sentences.target: Le vent vient du nord aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: Le vent vient du nord aujourd’hui.
translations.en: The wind is coming from the north today.
translations.es: Hoy el viento viene del norte.
translations.de: Heute kommt der Wind aus dem Norden.
translations.it: Oggi il vento viene da nord.
translations.pt: Hoje o vento vem do norte.
translations.vi: Hôm nay gió thổi từ phía bắc.
translations.nl: Vandaag kommt de wind uit het noorden.
translations.hu: Ma észak felől fúj a szél.
translations.hi: आज हवा उत्तर से चल रही है.
translations.el: Σήμερα ο άνεμος πνέει από βορρά.
translations.nb: I dag kommer vinden fra nord.
translations.id: Hari ini angin bertiup dari utara.
translations.sv: I dag kommer vinden från norr.
translations.da: I dag kommer vinden fra nord.
translations.ja: 今日は北から風が吹いています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'vent'.
Common noun; subject of 'vient'.
Main finite verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); indicates origin/source with a 'de' complement.
Preposition contracted with the definite article ('de' + 'le'); introduces the source 'du nord'.
Common noun denoting a direction; object of the preposition 'du'.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action occurs.
